english: Somewhere in the Sea of Marmara
That sort of behavior is unacceptable. You're fired!
zh: 这种行为不可接受。你被解雇了！

english: Angry at being attacked by his so-called ally,\nArmstrong punches you so hard you die.
zh: 阿姆斯特朗因遭到所谓盟友的袭击而勃然大怒，\n一拳将你打死。
note: line breaks are escaped as \n

english: I've planted explosive number 6. Let's return to the extraction point.
zh: 我已经安放了6号炸药。返回撤离点吧。

english: The power to the security gates is off. Let's find the generator and restore power.
zh: 安全门断电了。去找发电机恢复供电。

english: Headquarters, the I'm at the Rally Point. Please advise.
zh: 总部，我已抵达集合点。请指示。

english: You must wait for the rest of your team to arrive!
zh: 你必须等待队伍的其他成员抵达！

english: Great idea, but you don't have the File Identification Number for Project: Omega.
zh: 主意不错，但你没有欧米伽计划的文件识别编号。

english: Maybe you should look for the File Identification Number for Project: Omega. It's probably stored in the vicinity.
zh: 也许你该寻找欧米伽计划的文件识别编号，它大概就存放在附近。

english: Seven more Super Soldiers to go!
Six more Super Soldiers to go!
Five more Super Soldiers to go!
Four more Super Soldiers to go!
Three more Super Soldiers to go!
Two more Super Soldiers to go!
One more Super Soldier to go!
Rescue your pilot and prevent H.A.R.M. from blowing up your plane!
zh: 救出飞行员，并阻止H.A.R.M.炸毁你的飞机！

english: Sink the Super Secret Submarine and stop the Super Soldier invasion.
zh: 击沉超级秘密潜艇，阻止超级士兵入侵。

english: This safe is opened by a special key. The lock cannot be picked.
zh: 这个保险柜需要特殊钥匙才能打开，无法用开锁器破解。

english: It's an image of a crane.
This is a voice activated door.\nYour name isn't recognized by the security system.
zh: 这扇门由声纹启动。\n安全系统无法识别你的姓名。
note: line breaks are escaped as \n

english: This door is sealed by an emergency lockdown.\nYou'll need to interrupt power to the security system.
zh: 这扇门因紧急封锁而被密封。\n你需要切断安全系统的电源。
note: line breaks are escaped as \n

english: Hide! If you're caught now, you'll fail your mission.
zh: 躲起来！现在被抓住，任务就会失败。

note: keep angle brackets; translate visible label inside if needed

zh: 告诉我有关任务目标的事。
告诉我有关技能点的事。

english: Enter the File Identification Number for Project: Omega.
zh: 输入欧米伽计划的文件识别编号。

note: keep angle brackets; translate visible label inside if needed

english: There are three mailboxes in front of the sweet shop. You must arrange them in a specific sequence to signal me.\n\nThe red mailbox should be open.
zh: 点心铺前有三个邮箱。你必须按特定状态排列它们，作为与我联络的信号。\n\n红色邮箱应保持打开。
note: line breaks are escaped as \n

english: There are three mailboxes in front of the sweet shop. You must arrange them in a specific sequence to signal me.\n\nThe gray mailbox should be closed.
zh: 点心铺前有三个邮箱。你必须按特定状态排列它们，作为与我联络的信号。\n\n灰色邮箱应保持关闭。
note: line breaks are escaped as \n

english: There are three mailboxes in front of the sweet shop. You must arrange them in a specific sequence to signal me.\n\nThe blue mailbox should be open.
zh: 点心铺前有三个邮箱。你必须按特定状态排列它们，作为与我联络的信号。\n\n蓝色邮箱应保持打开。
note: line breaks are escaped as \n

english: I'll meet you at the sweet shop on the west side of the neighborhood. Look for the sign with the crane near a vending machine.
zh: 我会在这一带西侧的点心铺与你会合。留意自动售货机附近带有仙鹤图案的招牌。

english: You found a letter containing classified information.
zh: 你找到了一封包含机密情报的信。

english: You found a roll of 35mm film.
zh: 你找到了一卷35毫米胶卷。
你找到了一张重要蓝图。
你找到了一些散乱的文件。
你找到了一盘开盘式录音带。

note: keep angle brackets; translate visible label inside if needed

english: Filing duty in the main records building.
zh: 在主档案大楼整理文件。

english: Zhukov caught him with an American magazine.
zh: 朱可夫发现他藏着一本美国杂志。

english: I never would have figured Mikhail for a Capitalist swine.
zh: 我真没想到米哈伊尔竟然是个资本主义猪猡。

english: He said he was using it for toilet paper because they've been out for three weeks and he didn't want to soil patriotic literature.
zh: 他说他们已经三周没有厕纸了，他拿那本杂志擦屁股，是因为不想玷污爱国文学。

english: If you ask me, he just wanted the magazine. He couldn't confiscate it if he didn't punish Mikhail.
zh: 依我看，他只是想要那本杂志。要是不惩罚米哈伊尔，他就没法名正言顺地没收。

english: Now that you mention it, Zhukov IS getting close to retirement.
zh: 你这么一说，朱可夫确实快退休了。

english: How do they expect us to stay fit eating this gruel?
zh: 天天吃这种稀粥，他们还指望我们保持体能？

english: I'd rather eat rocks. You can kill a rabbit with this bread.
zh: 我宁愿啃石头。这面包硬得能砸死兔子。

english: Actually, that's not a bad idea.
I'm patrolling the west perimeter tomorrow. I'll hunt, you cook.
zh: 我明天巡逻西侧边界。我负责打猎，你负责做饭。

english: Have they found out what's wrong with the communications relay?
zh: 他们查出通信中继站出了什么问题吗？

english: Well, stay alert. It might have been sabotage.
zh: 提高警惕，也许是有人破坏。

english: He was filing documents down the hall.
zh: 刚才还在走廊那边整理文件。

english: I searched everywhere. He's just gone.
zh: 我到处都找过，他就这么消失了。

english: He could have gone back to the barracks.
In the middle of a shift? He's on duty for another 11 hours.
zh: 值班到一半？他还要再值十一小时。
他怎么可能就这样消失？
鲍里斯上个月也消失了。

english: Boris went AWOL. He must have.
zh: 鲍里斯擅离职守，肯定是这样。

english: Without taking his coat? Or his hat?
This is the Union of Soviet Socialist Republics. People don't just vanish without a trace.
zh: 这里可是苏维埃社会主义共和国联盟。人不可能凭空消失，连一点痕迹都没有。
这话你去跟米哈伊尔说吧。

english: I was transferred from Novgorod to work on Project: Omega.
zh: 我从诺夫哥罗德调来参与欧米伽计划。

english: I've heard of that. What is it, anyway?
zh: 我听说过，那到底是什么？

english: I'm not sure. Nobody told me anything about it. I've spent three days trying to find information.
zh: 我也不清楚，没人告诉我任何情况。我已经查了三天资料。

english: Did you check the M-9 mainframe?
It's out of order. One of the vacuum tubes blew and nobody can find a replacement.
zh: 坏了。一根真空管烧毁了，谁也找不到替换件。

english: I saw one in the basement the other day.
zh: 前几天我在地下室见过一根。

english: I don't remember exactly. Either on a shelf or in a cabinet.
zh: 记不清了，不是在架子上，就是在柜子里。

english: How much longer do we have to put up with them?
zh: 我们还要忍受他们多久？

english: Nobody's sure. I don't think anybody even knows what it is.
zh: 没人确定，我觉得甚至没人知道项目究竟是什么。

english: It better be soon. I'm running out of patience.
zh: 最好快点，我已经没耐心了。
我相信他们一定吓坏了。

english: She may try to come this way. Stay alert!
zh: 她可能会从这边过来，保持警惕！

english: We got us a spy on the loose.
Heck if I know. Can't get straight answers out of anybody around here.
zh: 鬼知道。这里谁都不肯给个明确答复。

english: Hello... Hello, my name is... Hello, my name is Tom Goodman. Yes, I'm Tom Goodman, master spy. Hey, sugar, ever made it with a spy? The name's Tom Goodman. They call me Tom. Well, hello, there... crap!
zh: 你好……你好，我叫……你好，我叫汤姆·古德曼。没错，我就是汤姆·古德曼，间谍大师。嘿，宝贝，和间谍上过床吗？我叫汤姆·古德曼，大家都叫我汤姆。哦，你好……该死！

english: This is the audio diary of Tom Goodman, volume 1, August 7, 1965. My spy training kit arrived in the mail today from Mr. X. It includes a UNITY field manual, a telephone monitoring device, and this tape recorder. I've decided to keep a log of my experiences for my memoirs. That way... Dang it!
zh: 这里是汤姆·古德曼的录音日记，第1卷，1965年8月7日。今天X先生把间谍训练套装邮寄给我了，里面有一本UNITY外勤手册、一台电话监听装置，还有这台录音机。我决定把经历记录下来，留作回忆录素材。这样……该死！

english: This is the diary of Tom Goodman, volume 2, August 14, 1965. Operation Imitation is proceeding ahead of schedule. It's only been a few weeks since I met Mr. X at that dive in Ft. Lauderdale and already I have become Tom Goodman, secret agent extraordinaire. Tomorrow, I begin Phase Two.
zh: 这里是汤姆·古德曼的日记，第2卷，1965年8月14日。“模仿行动”进展超前。我在劳德代尔堡那家破酒吧遇见X先生才几周，就已经变成了汤姆·古德曼——非凡的秘密特工。明天开始第二阶段。

english: This is the diary of Tom Goodman, volume 3, August 27, 1965. I've installed my top secret spy headquarters in the basement. I call it my inner sanctum. It is what separates me from ordinary men. The entrance is carefully hidden so that enemy agents won't find it. They'll have to torture me if they want in.
zh: 这里是汤姆·古德曼的日记，第3卷，1965年8月27日。我已经把绝密间谍总部设在地下室，称之为“内殿”。正是它让我与凡人区别开来。入口隐藏得非常严密，敌方特工绝对找不到。想进去的话，他们只能拷问我。

english: This is the diary of Tom Goodman, volume 4, September 17, 1965. There's been an unfortunate setback. I've got the look, I've got the walk, I've got the moves, but I'm still not getting the chicks. Mr. X hasn't been helpful. I'm starting to wonder if he takes me seriously. What does he think I am, a sock puppet? Huh? Is that it, Mr. X? You think you can just stick your hand up my butt and make me dance? Tom Goodman dances for nobody.
zh: 这里是汤姆·古德曼的日记，第4卷，1965年9月17日。发生了一点不幸的挫折。我已经有了外表、步态和身手，可还是泡不到女人。X先生也帮不上忙。我开始怀疑他是否认真对待我。他把我当成什么，袜子木偶吗？怎么，X先生？你以为把手伸进我屁股里，就能让我跳舞？汤姆·古德曼绝不任人摆布。

english: Diary of Tom Goodman, volume 5, December 9, 1965. A breakthrough at last. She wasn't good-looking and she smelled like a horse, but she was woman enough for me. The last obstacle to my success as a super spy has been conquered. As of today, I am no longer a virgin. Yeeeeeeehawwwwww!
zh: 汤姆·古德曼日记，第5卷，1965年12月9日。终于取得突破。她长得不好看，闻起来像匹马，但对我来说已经够有女人味了。成为超级间谍道路上的最后一道障碍终于被征服。从今天起，我不再是处男。呀呀呀呀呼！

english: Wait here. I'll be back shortly.
zh: 在这里等着，我很快回来。

english: This place is not for you.
zh: 这里不是你该来的地方。

english: I'm sorry, but this area is off limits to you.
zh: 抱歉，这个区域禁止你进入。

english: Grab those Wanted posters before someone recognizes us.
zh: 快把那些通缉海报拿走，别让人认出我们。

english: I bring word from Kamal. He wants to meet with you as soon as possible.
zh: 我带来了卡马尔的消息，他希望尽快与你会面。

english: There's an out of order phone booth near the movie theater. I left a package for you. The combination is 32-46-27. Good luck!
zh: 电影院附近有个坏掉的电话亭，我给你留了个包裹。密码是32-46-27。祝你好运！

english: Have you seen a blue envelope?
zh: 你见过一个蓝色信封吗？

english: No reason. But if you find it, let me know!
zh: 没什么。要是找到，记得告诉我！

english: Have you seen a blue envelope anywhere?
zh: 你在什么地方见过蓝色信封吗？

english: A blue envelope? What's in it?
zh: 蓝色信封？里面装着什么？

english: Uh, nothing important. But bring it to me right away if you find it.
zh: 呃，没什么重要的。不过找到后立刻交给我。

english: Seen any blue envelopes lying around?
zh: 看到过哪个地方放着蓝色信封吗？

english: The one the boss gave you?
What? Oh, yes, I suppose he did.
zh: 什么？哦，对，好像确实是他给我的。

english: I haven't seen it. Must be pretty important, eh?
zh: 我没见过。一定很重要吧？

english: Well, not really. But I should probably find it.
zh: 其实也没那么重要，不过我最好还是找到它。

english: I'm looking for a blue envelope. Have you seen it?
zh: 我在找一个蓝色信封，你见过吗？

english: Lord Shiva protect me from my own stupidity.
zh: 愿湿婆神保护我，别再犯蠢了。
看看他们对我做了什么！！！

english: They should be sitting on a table in plain sight.
zh: 它们应该就摆在桌上，一眼便能看到。

english: I'm sorry to impose on you.
I'm sure I can figure out some means of dealing with those nasty super soldiers once I can read these documents.
zh: 等我读完这些文件，一定能想出对付那些讨厌超级士兵的办法。

english: Say what you like, but this place makes a lot more sense from a business perspective.
zh: 随你怎么说，但从商业角度看，这个地方合理多了。

english: You're missing the point. Anybody can build an underwater base. Only one or two organizations in the world can afford a space station.
zh: 你没抓住重点。任何人都能造水下基地，全球只有一两个组织负担得起空间站。

english: That's a lot to pay for a little prestige. That hunk of junk almost put us out of business. Whoever blew it up did us a favor.
zh: 为了那点面子花这么多钱，太不划算了。那堆破烂差点让我们破产，把它炸掉的人反而帮了我们。

english: I'm serious. The insurance settlement paid for this base, the super secret submarine, and new offices in Lisbon, Jakarta, and Orlando. Plus we all got bonuses for the first time ever.
zh: 我是认真的。保险赔款支付了这座基地、超级秘密潜艇，以及里斯本、雅加达和奥兰多的新办公室。我们所有人还第一次拿到了奖金。

english: That stuff's great, but I still say the space station added a lot of value. It's about image. People want to work for successful organizations. Having a space station makes you look successful.
zh: 那些确实不错，但我还是认为空间站带来了很多价值。关键是形象。人们都想为成功的组织工作，拥有空间站会让你显得很成功。

english: Until it puts you out of business.
I give up. Let's just drop it.
This is the fifth time I've had to switch offices since I started here.
zh: 我来这里工作以后，已经第五次换办公室了。

english: Management wants to keep the teams together. For efficiency.
zh: 管理层想让各小组待在一起，提高效率。

english: They're not the ones that have to pack up all their crap and haul it down the corridor every three months.
zh: 可他们不用每三个月就把自己的破烂打包，沿走廊拖到另一头。

english: And end up like Pekoe? No, thanks. You can still see him out the porthole on level 2. What's left of him, anyway. The parts the fishes didn't eat.
zh: 然后落得和佩科一样？免了吧。现在从二层舷窗还能看到他，至少能看到剩下的部分，那些鱼没吃掉的部分。

english: All right, already. I just ate.
zh: 行了，别说了，我刚吃完饭。

english: Hey, Barbagallo, so how you liking H.A.R.M. so far?
zh: 嘿，巴尔巴加洛，你觉得H.A.R.M.怎么样？

english: This is a pretty classy outfit compared to some of the places I've worked.
zh: 和我以前待过的地方相比，这里算是相当体面了。

english: You used to be at CCI, right?
Yeah, and Mockery Makery. Buncha low life thugs. It's nice to be working with professionals.
zh: 是，还在“嘲弄制造厂”干过。全是一群下三滥，还是和专业人士共事舒服。

english: We've been around a while now. In this business, you adapt or die.
zh: 我们也经营了一段时间。在这一行，不适应就得死。

english: I hear ya. Only complaint I got is the salute. It's kinda complicated. I'm always worried about leaving part of it out.
zh: 我懂。唯一不满就是敬礼动作，太复杂了。我总担心漏掉其中一部分。
有人向你解释过它的象征意义吗？

english: The first part of the salute is Heart. That stands for desire. The second part is World. The last part is Grab or Take.
zh: 敬礼的第一部分是“心”，象征欲望；第二部分是“世界”；最后一部分是“抓住”或“夺取”。

english: Well, heck, that makes a lot more sense. Thanks!
I don't know. It's a lot of responsibility.
What are you worried about? You get along great with everybody.
zh: 你担心什么？你和所有人都相处得很好。

english: It's my laugh. I don't think it's evil enough.
zh: 是我的笑声，我觉得不够邪恶。

english: It could use some work. Try a little deeper.
zh: 还需要练练，试着低沉一点。

english: Maybe you just need a motivation. Like an actor. Pretend some goody two shoes spy comes up and says he's gonna arrest you. Except instead of a gat, he's holding a banana.
zh: 也许你只是缺少动机，像演员一样。假装一个假正经间谍走过来，说要逮捕你，可他手里拿的不是枪，而是一根香蕉。

english: Okay. I'll give it a shot.

zh: 看见了吗？这样就完美了。

english: Gee, thanks! I owe you one.
Heh, don't be surprised if I collect. Now that you're a manager and all.
zh: 嘿，别惊讶我以后会来讨债。你现在可是管理层了。

english: Rick said you slept in the lounge again last night.
zh: 里克说你昨晚又睡在休息室。

english: I couldn't get my door open. It's those stupid voice activated locks.
zh: 我的门打不开，又是那些该死的声控锁。

english: Yeah, the system can't really handle fluctuations in pitch or tempo, so you've got to say things exactly the same each time.
zh: 对，那套系统不太能处理音高或节奏变化，所以每次都得一模一样地说。

english: How am I supposed to do that?
Easy. Get yourself a tape recorder. Works like a charm.
zh: 很简单，弄台录音机，效果绝佳。

english: Maybe so, but sleeping in the lounge is against my principles.
zh: 也许吧，但睡休息室有违我的原则。

english: These uniforms sure look a lot better than the old ones, but the fabric is really uncomfortable.
zh: 这些新制服确实比旧款好看多了，可布料穿着真不舒服。

english: Yeah, well, they blew most of their budget the first time, so they couldn't afford the same material.
zh: 没办法，他们第一次几乎耗光了预算，已经买不起同样的面料。

english: I hope I don't get a rash.
Did you hear we basically swept the Evil Academy Awards?
zh: 听说我们几乎横扫了邪恶学院奖？

english: Yeah, but I don't get it. Project: Lambda was a disaster.
zh: 听说了，但我不明白。拉姆达计划明明是场灾难。

english: Sure, but name one organization that pulled off a successful caper last year.
zh: 没错，可你说说去年有哪个组织成功完成过一次恶行？

english: We lost out to Evil Alliance in logo design and Misery, Inc. in the fashion categories, but you gotta admit Lambda showed a lot of ambition and panache.
zh: 我们在标志设计上输给了邪恶联盟，在时尚奖项上输给了悲惨公司，但你得承认，拉姆达计划确实很有野心，也很有派头。

english: I'll be waiting to see what happens next year. I think Omega is gonna turn a lot of heads.
zh: 等着看明年会怎样吧，我觉得欧米伽会让所有人大吃一惊。

english: There's got to be another way out of here!
zh: 这里一定还有别的出口！

english: My mom is gonna be devastated. My big brother was aboard the space station when it disintegrated.
zh: 我妈一定会崩溃。我哥哥就在那座解体的空间站上。

english: Stop talking that way. We're gonna make it out of here. We just have to use our heads.
zh: 别这么说，我们会逃出去的，只要动动脑子。

english: I need you to shut down the security system.
zh: 我需要你关闭安全系统。

english: Work harder! Those flames are eating up our oxygen.
zh: 再努力点！火焰正在耗尽我们的氧气。

english: Where the hell is that stupid secret door? Huh?
zh: 那扇该死的秘密门到底在哪儿？啊？

english: We're gonna die unless we get off this deathtrap. And you're telling me to get a hold of myself?
zh: 不离开这个死亡陷阱，我们就会死。你却叫我冷静？

english: Wow, what a blinding insight! Panicking won't help? Oh, then maybe I should just stop. Except I'm panicking, which means I'm not in control of myself, you big, dumb idiot!
zh: 哇，真是振聋发聩的高见！慌张也无济于事？那我干脆不慌了。可我现在就是在慌，这意味着我根本控制不了自己，你这个又蠢又大的白痴！

english: All right, spread out and search.
Richards, take Mulroy and go help secure the power station. We can't afford to let her get in there.
zh: 理查兹，带穆尔罗伊去协助控制发电站，绝不能让她进去。

english: All security teams, report at once.
zh: 所有安保小队，立即报告。

english: I want the girl found immediately.
zh: 我要马上找到那个女人。

english: Ms. Archer, I seem to have underestimated you. I won't make the that mistake again.
zh: 阿彻女士，看来我低估了你。我不会再犯同样的错误。

english: Why is she not in custody yet?
Ms. Archer, it is I, Dmitrij Volkov. I look forward to our next meeting. I suspect it will be sooner than you think.
zh: 阿彻女士，是我，德米特里·沃尔科夫。我很期待下次见面，而且我怀疑那会比你想象得更早。

english: Director, your mother is holding on line 2.
zh: 局长，您母亲正在2号线等待。

english: Attention, all personnel. Assault teams 1 through 4, report to terminal B for mission outfitting.
zh: 全体人员注意。第1至第4突击队前往B终端领取任务装备。

english: We are now at Condition Omega.
Well, everyone, I'm off to start a war.
zh: 好了，各位，我要去发动战争了。

english: For every minute that Ms. Archer remains at large, we will be deducting one full day's salary from your paychecks. Perhaps THAT will motivate you.
zh: 阿彻女士每逍遥一分钟，就从你们的工资中扣除整整一天薪水。也许这样能让你们积极一点。

english: Hey, there, Klaus, how's it going?
Ah, just hunting for that spy. Don't want my pay getting docked.
zh: 啊，正在找那个间谍，不想被扣工资。

english: I should probably be helping, but I'm feeling a little unmotivated just now.
zh: 我大概也该帮忙，可我现在一点动力都没有。

english: The Director's motivational techniques don't really inspire me. I have some rebellious tendencies in my nature that make me become somewhat resentful when I'm threatened or demeaned.
zh: 局长的激励手段并不能真正激励我。我天生有点反叛倾向，受到威胁或羞辱时会心生怨恨。

english: I hear ya, but sometimes you gotta swallow your pride.
zh: 我懂，但有时你得咽下自尊。

english: True, but I also think it's important to stand up for your principles. If I hunt for the spy as ordered, under threat of salary deductions, I am sending a message that punitive management practices are acceptable.
zh: 没错，不过我也认为坚持原则很重要。如果我在扣工资的威胁下按命令搜索间谍，就等于在传达一种信息：惩罚式管理是可以接受的。

english: I hate to break it to you, buddy, but that's the way all these villain outfits are run. Most of these guys have no prior management experience, they come from screwed up families, they didn't go to college, and they can't take criticism without flying off the handle. It's a drag, but it comes with the territory.
zh: 朋友，不得不告诉你，所有反派组织都是这么运作的。这些家伙大多没有任何管理经验，家庭一团糟，没上过大学，又完全听不得批评，一说就暴跳如雷。确实很烦，但这就是行业现实。

english: Just because this behavior is institutionalized doesn't mean it's tolerable. You have to ask yourself, what is my goal and how can I best accomplish it. If you're a manager and you want to get your employees to search for a renegade spy, you can either use incentive or punishment for motivation. Studies show punishment to be considerably less effective.
zh: 这种行为制度化了，不代表就能容忍。你必须问自己：我的目标是什么，怎样才能最有效地实现？如果你是管理者，想让员工搜捕叛逃间谍，可以用奖励，也可以用惩罚。研究表明，惩罚的效果要差得多。

english: You got a point. But around here, punishments can be permanent.
zh: 你说得有道理。不过这里的惩罚可能是永久性的。

english: Well, you must exercise judgment, of course. In this situation, the risk is purely financial, so I'm willing to chance the consequences. If it were life and death, I would probably do as I was told.
zh: 当然必须自行判断。在这种情况下，风险纯粹是经济上的，所以我愿意承担后果。要是生死攸关，我大概会照命令做。

english: All right, buddy, I'm gonna go search. You watch your back.
zh: 好了，朋友，我去搜索了。你自己小心。

english: Where do you think you're going?
We have unfinished business to attend to.
Last time we met, it was beneath the ice. This time, it is over a lake of boiling artificial lava. How appropriate.
zh: 上次见面是在冰层之下，这次是在沸腾的人造熔岩湖上方，真是再合适不过。

english: Close in! Don't let her escape!
All right, keep your eyes open!
Fan out and proceed to your target areas.
zh: 分散开，前往各自目标区域。

english: We're supposed to rendezvous with Team 4.
zh: 我们应该和第4小队会合。

english: We will, but first we need to make sure the perimeter is secure.
zh: 会合是会合，但首先得确保周边安全。

english: I left my lunchbox on the sub!
zh: 我把午餐盒落在潜艇上了！

english: Didn't you go over your mission readiness checklist?
zh: 你没检查任务准备清单吗？

english: I didn't have time. They had me scrubbing toilets. Heck, I almost forgot to grab my gun.
zh: 没时间，他们让我刷厕所。见鬼，我差点连枪都忘了拿。

english: Well, it's too late to go back now. You can have half of my sandwich.
zh: 现在回去也来不及了，你可以吃我半个三明治。

english: Man, I owe you big time.
We've got a problem. Agent Archer seems to have fallen into a nefarious trap. She's being hunted by ninjas.
zh: 出问题了。阿彻特工似乎落入了一个邪恶陷阱，正被忍者追杀。

english: She's supposed to rendezvous with Agent Yamata near the waterfall on the far side of the village. Locate her and get out of there!
zh: 她应该在村庄另一侧瀑布附近与山田特工会合。找到她，然后撤离！

english: Search everywhere. She may be hiding.
zh: 到处搜，她可能藏起来了。

english: There she is! I hope you're not too late.
zh: 她在那里！希望你们还没来晚。

english: The car's out of commission. You're going to have to carry her back to the safe house and wait for help.
zh: 汽车坏了，你们得把她背回安全屋，等待援助。

english: Those fools had orders to guard this area.
zh: 那些蠢货奉命守卫这里。

english: They must have gone on to the waterfall.
zh: 他们一定追到瀑布去了。

english: Or maybe they ran into trouble. Keep your eyes open.
zh: 也可能遇到了麻烦，保持警惕。

english: What's going on around here? Why aren't people at their posts?
zh: 这里怎么回事？为什么大家都不在岗位上？

english: The spy escaped. They're pursuing her.
zh: 间谍逃跑了，他们正在追捕她。

english: Someone has to guard the estate. What if it's a trick? Maybe she's coming back.
zh: 总得有人守住宅邸。万一这是圈套呢？也许她会回来。

english: Stay here. I'll see who else I can find. If there's any sign of trouble, sound the alarm.
zh: 留在这里。我去找找其他人。有任何异常就拉响警报。

english: Well done! Help is on the way.
The drop didn't go as well as we'd hoped. The rally point is a secluded hunting dacha near the installation. Use the radio there to contact mission control for further instructions.
zh: 这次空投没有我们预想得那么顺利。集合点是设施附近一座偏僻的狩猎别墅。使用那里的无线电联系任务控制中心，获取后续指示。

english: Now that Agent Archer has retrieved the information we needed from the mainframe computer at the nearby Soviet installation, we want you to shut down this operation for good.
zh: 既然阿彻特工已经从附近苏联设施的主机中取得了所需情报，我们希望你们彻底终止这项行动。

english: Reinforcements have already converged on the site, so getting in there won't be easy. Do whatever it takes. We need that computer destroyed.
zh: 援军已经汇聚到现场，潜入不会容易。不惜一切代价，我们必须摧毁那台计算机。

english: They sent him to the main records building.
zh: 他们把他派去了主档案大楼。

english: I thought that area was off limits.
It is. He's been assigned to help assess the damage.
zh: 没错，他被派去协助评估损失。

english: Poor idiot. That's probably the last we'll ever see of him.
zh: 可怜的蠢货，我们大概再也见不到他了。

english: We don't need explosives. We need manpower. We have to inventory all the files to see what's missing. There are records dating back to the revolution stored in that place.
zh: 我们不需要炸药，需要人手。必须清点所有文件，确认丢失了什么。那里保存着从革命时期开始的记录。

english: That's what I love about the Soviet Union. You ask for accountants, you get nitroglycerine.
zh: 这就是我喜欢苏联的地方。申请会计，送来的却是硝化甘油。

english: Then maybe we should ask for nitroglycerine.
zh: 那我们也许该申请硝化甘油。

english: I'm afraid they'd just send more.
zh: 恐怕他们只会送来更多。

english: Is it safe with that stuff lying around?
zh: 这些东西放在这里安全吗？

english: I had them put it in the basement. It should be safe there until we can arrange to ship it somewhere else.
zh: 我让人放进地下室了。在安排运走前，应该很安全。

english: It could take weeks to get the paperwork approved.
zh: 文件审批可能需要好几周。

english: I'm not kidding around. If I catch you smoking down here again, I'll drag you outside and chop you into fire wood.
zh: 我不是开玩笑。要是再发现你在这里抽烟，我就把你拖出去劈成柴火。

english: All right, already. I get the point.

zh: 香烟和炸药不能混在一起。

english: This stuff makes me nervous. I want to patrol outside.
zh: 这些东西让我紧张，我想去外面巡逻。

english: Shut up and do as you're told.
Those idiots! What did they do?
zh: 那群蠢货！他们干了什么？

english: Secure the perimeter. It might have been an accident, but it could have been sabotage. Nobody leaves this base!
zh: 封锁周边。可能只是事故，也可能是破坏行动。谁都不许离开基地！
足智多谋！你们表现得非常出色。

english: Agent Archer will need a password in order to infiltrate H.A.R.M. headquarters.
zh: 阿彻特工需要一个密码才能潜入H.A.R.M.总部。

english: Magnus Armstrong's friend Kamal is going to help us. First, you'll need to find him. He should have left a note for you.
zh: 马格努斯·阿姆斯特朗的朋友卡马尔会帮助我们。首先你们得找到他，他应该给你们留了便条。

english: No one gets through this gate without paying me.
zh: 不付钱，谁也别想通过这扇门。

english: A man named Balaji Malpani is responsible for coming up with a new password each day. Obtain a photograph of him.
zh: 每天的新密码由一个名叫巴拉吉·马尔帕尼的人负责制定，取得他的照片。

english: He keeps an apartment in the Hotel Happy Guest. Look for him there.
zh: 他住在快乐宾客酒店的一间公寓里，去那里找他。

english: Balaji visits his mistress every afternoon. Try to locate her apartment. She always keeps flowers outside.
zh: 巴拉吉每天下午都会拜访情妇。设法找到她的公寓，她总在外面摆着鲜花。

english: There's a balcony across from her room. You should be able to photograph Balaji from there.
zh: 她房间对面有个阳台，你们应该能从那里拍到巴拉吉。

english: You shouldn't have come here. You're a married man.
zh: 你不该来这里，你已经结婚了。

english: But I cannot resist your charms, my delicate peach. I am cursed with forbidden love. It pulses in my loins.
zh: 可我无法抗拒你的魅力，我娇嫩的蜜桃。我被禁忌之爱诅咒，它在我的胯下搏动。

english: What must I do to convince you of my love?
zh: 我要怎么做才能让你相信我的爱？

english: It is not me you must convince. It is my father.
zh: 你不需要说服我，需要说服的是我父亲。

english: Your father? He's so old fashioned. He won't be satisfied unless I marry you.
zh: 你父亲？他太守旧了。除非我娶你，否则他不会满意。

english: If you love me, why won't you prove it?
zh: 你爱我，为什么不肯证明？

english: Don't say it like that. It sounds so vulgar.
zh: 别这么说，听起来太粗俗了。

english: Why must we always bicker. Let us embrace and put these trivial matters out of our minds.
zh: 我们为什么总要争吵？让我们拥抱，把这些琐事都抛在脑后。

english: Your first priority is to evacuate Magnus Armstrong.
zh: 你们的首要任务是撤离马格努斯·阿姆斯特朗。

english: Also, search for any additional information on Project: Omega.
zh: 另外，搜寻欧米伽计划的更多情报。

english: When you're done, plant explosives and level the site.
zh: 完成后安放炸药，把设施夷为平地。

english: Be careful. The place is probably crawling with H.A.R.M. reinforcements by now.
zh: 小心，现在那里大概已经挤满了H.A.R.M.援军。

english: There's got to be some gas around here some where. Look for a jerry can.
zh: 这里附近肯定有汽油，找个油桶。

english: Man, this place is a wreck. It's gonna take weeks to assess the damage.
zh: 天哪，这地方一片狼藉。评估损失得花上好几周。

english: I sure hope they figure out why that super soldier went rogue. We can't afford to having those things rampaging every other week.
zh: 真希望他们查清那个超级士兵为什么失控。我们可承受不起这些怪物隔三差五就暴走。

english: Attention all personnel, apparently we still have a mime problem.
zh: 全体人员注意，看来哑剧演员的问题依然存在。

english: Intercept teams, report to Temporary Director Lawrie in the cafeteria.
zh: 各拦截小队，前往食堂向劳里临时局长报到。

english: Good, you made it. Agent Archer just left on an assignment, so you're going to have to mop up.
zh: 很好，你们来了。阿彻特工刚刚出任务，所以善后工作只能交给你们。

english: The mimes have seized the security office.
zh: 哑剧演员占领了安全办公室。

english: They're taking hostages and planting explosives throughout the building.
zh: 他们正在劫持人质，并在整栋大楼安放炸药。

english: Oh, thank you! The pain was unbearable!
zh: 哦，谢谢！那种痛苦简直无法忍受！

english: Get away from me, you filthy mimes!
zh: 离我远点，你们这些肮脏的哑剧演员！

english: What you girly boys need is a good kick in the fancy pants.
zh: 你们这些娘娘腔需要的，就是往花裤子上狠狠踹一脚。

english: Keep your sissy paws offa me, you perverts.
zh: 把你们那娘炮爪子从我身上拿开，你们这些变态。

english: I say once we take care of the Commies, we march into France and round up the rest of these clowns. We'd be doing the world a favor.
zh: 我说，等解决了共党，我们就进军法国，把剩下这些小丑全抓起来。那是在为全世界做好事。

english: You again? Get away from that microphone, Frenchie! Ow!
zh: 又是你？离麦克风远点，法国佬！哎哟！

english: Oh, ho! Once again, I have seized ze microphone.
zh: 哦呵！我又一次夺取了麦克风。

english: Soon this wretched agency will be one big crater. Won't that be nice?
zh: 很快，这个可悲的机构就会变成一个大坑，不是很好吗？

english: You secret agents are no match for my deadly mimes.
zh: 你们这些秘密特工根本不是我致命哑剧演员的对手。

english: You people have no appreciation for the subtle art of pantomime. I pity you.
zh: 你们根本不懂哑剧这门微妙艺术，我真可怜你们。

english: Damn you! I curse your mothers!
zh: 该死！我诅咒你们的母亲！

english: You haven't heard the last of Pierre, the Mime King!
zh: 哑剧之王皮埃尔还没完呢！
他们到处都是！快做点什么！

english: Oh, thank you! I have a low threshold for performance art!
zh: 哦，谢谢！我对行为艺术的忍耐力很低！

english: H.A.R.M. and Evil Alliance are close to a mutual assistance agreement. We can't afford to let that happen.
zh: H.A.R.M.与邪恶联盟即将达成互助协议，我们不能让它发生。

english: Fortunately, a disillusioned H.A.R.M. agent has agreed to assist us. His name is Kamal. Locate him and see what he has to offer.
zh: 幸运的是，一名对H.A.R.M.心灰意冷的特工同意协助我们。他叫卡马尔，找到他，看看能提供什么帮助。

english: But I thought we were going to be working together.
We are, but this transgression cannot go unpunished. This man, Kamal, has insulted our honor. He must not be allowed to live.
zh: 没错，但这次冒犯不能不受惩罚。卡马尔侮辱了我们的荣誉，他必须死。

english: I don't think H.A.R.M. will be happy about us killing him.
zh: 我觉得H.A.R.M.不会乐意我们杀掉他。

english: That's why we're going to make it look like an accident.
zh: 所以我们要把它伪装成事故。

english: But you sent a squad of assassins to chop him into tiny pieces. I don't think they'll believe it was an accident.
zh: 可你派了一队杀手，要把他砍成碎片。他们不可能相信那是事故。

english: Fool, we'll tell them we thought he was someone else. Besides, they won't let one little murder stand in the way of the treaty.
zh: 蠢货，我们就说认错人了。况且，他们不会因为一桩小小的谋杀就放弃条约。

english: Thank you for saving my life.
H.A.R.M. and Evil Alliance both have headquarters in this area. Search there for information on how to drive a wedge between them.
zh: H.A.R.M.和邪恶联盟在这一带都有总部。去那里搜索情报，看看如何挑拨他们之间的关系。

english: Evil Alliance is based in a movie theatre.
zh: 邪恶联盟的基地设在一家电影院里。

english: I don't like the idea of joining forces with those H.A.R.M. guys.
zh: 我不喜欢和H.A.R.M.那些家伙联手的主意。

english: I don't trust them. Do you know what their name stands for?
zh: 我不信任他们。你知道H.A.R.M.这名字代表什么吗？

english: Neither do I. That doesn't make me very comfortable.
zh: 我也不知道，这让我很不安。

english: So what? They have their own movie theatre. They show movies every Saturday night.
zh: 那又怎样？他们有自己的电影院，每周六晚上都会放电影。

english: You have a point, but I'm worried about our reputation. The name H.A.R.M. strikes fear into people's hearts. Nobody takes Evil Alliance seriously. They're a bunch of lazy whiners with huge entitlement issues.
zh: 你说得有道理，但我担心我们的名声。H.A.R.M.这个名字能让人闻风丧胆，没人把邪恶联盟当回事。他们只是一群懒惰、爱抱怨、认为世界欠他们的家伙。

english: Don't worry. Everyone will just assume it's a hostile takeover.
zh: 别担心，大家只会以为这是一次恶意收购。

english: I don't share your optimism. I think a lot of people will wonder if we've lost our nerve. If it was a hostile takeover, why would we let them keep their identity?
zh: 我没你那么乐观。我觉得很多人会怀疑我们是不是失去胆量。要真是恶意收购，为什么还让他们保留自己的身份？

english: Hmm, I didn't think of that.
Intelligence suggests that H.A.R.M. has dispatched a hit squad to ruin Mr. Jones' vacation. It's up to you to keep that from happening.
zh: 情报显示，H.A.R.M.派出了一支暗杀小队，准备毁掉琼斯先生的假期。你们必须阻止此事。

english: It's very important that Mr. Jones not know we're here or his vacation will be ruined.
zh: 绝不能让琼斯先生知道我们在这里，否则他的假期就毁了。

english: I could sure use a massage.
You're not a very good secretary.
zh: 你这个秘书可不怎么样。

english: I tell you they're planning something major. And management isn't lifting a finger to find out what.
zh: 我告诉你，他们正在策划大事，可管理层一点调查的意思都没有。

english: I expect them to do something!
Like what? Raid their headquarters? Remember what happened last time we tried that? We're still getting pieces of Vijay in the mail.
zh: 比如什么？突袭他们总部？还记得上次这么做的结果吗？我们现在还会收到邮寄来的维杰残肢。

english: Better than sitting around doing nothing.
zh: 总比坐着什么都不做好。

english: I'm sure they have a plan. You'll see. Everything will be fine.
zh: 他们肯定有计划，你等着看吧，一切都会没事的。

english: If that's supposed to make me feel better, it isn't working.
zh: 这话要是想让我安心，那完全没用。

english: I tell you the woman is driving me crazy.
zh: 我告诉你，那个女人快把我逼疯了。

english: I warned you not to marry her.
Not my wife, you idiot. Her mother! She was so sweet and friendly up until the wedding, then she turned into a vicious demon. All she does is complain.
zh: 不是我老婆，你这个白痴，是她母亲！婚礼前她一直温柔友善，婚礼后却变成了恶毒的魔鬼，整天只会抱怨。

english: Maybe you should remind her that she's living in YOUR home.
zh: 也许你该提醒她，她住的是你的房子。

english: Are you crazy? She'd kill me.
I'm thinking you need to be more assertive.
zh: 我觉得你应该更强硬一点。

english: You don't know this woman. She's dangerous.
zh: 你不了解那个女人，她很危险。

english: You work for one of the evilest terrorist organizations on the planet. If anybody in your household is dangerous, my friend, I think it must be you.
zh: 你为地球上最邪恶的恐怖组织之一工作。朋友，如果你家里有人危险，那应该是你才对。

english: You know, when you put it like that the logic suddenly becomes clear. How can I repay you?
zh: 你这么一说，逻辑一下子就清楚了。我该怎么报答你？

english: Don't mention it. I hate to see a good friend emasculated.
zh: 别放在心上。我可不忍心看着好友被阉了气势。

english: Do you find my accent offensive?
zh: 你觉得我的口音冒犯人吗？

english: I was born and raised in the U.S.
My parents moved to Philadelphia in the 1930s. I grew up there. Went to American schools, had American friends.
zh: 我父母在20世纪30年代搬到费城，我在那里长大，上美国学校，也有美国朋友。

english: Then what are you doing here?
I've always wanted to see where my family came from. So I put in for a transfer.
zh: 我一直想看看家族故乡，所以申请调了过来。

english: Why are you using a fake accent?
To fit in. I wasn't sure how people would react if they found out I was a foreigner. But I worry if I'm overdoing it.
zh: 为了融入。我不确定大家发现我是外国人后会怎么反应，但我担心自己是不是演得太过头了。

english: I have a confession to make. I'm from Detroit.
zh: 我有件事要坦白，我来自底特律。

english: I don't think we're the only ones, either. When Vijay gets drunk, I could swear he's got an Oklahoma twang. And I'm almost positive Deepak is British.
zh: 而且我觉得不只我们两个。维杰喝醉后，我敢说他带着俄克拉何马口音。我也几乎肯定迪帕克是英国人。

english: Well, probably better to keep up appearances.
zh: 那最好还是继续装下去。

english: Don't tell me, let me guess. He thinks your walking against the wind is too understated.
zh: 别告诉我，让我猜。他觉得你“逆风行走”的动作太含蓄。

english: Oui. He wants a stronger wind.
Well, that explains it. Deveraux believes the wind must be a tempest. My instructor learned from Jarre. Jarre argues for a playful spring breeze.
zh: 那就解释得通了。德弗罗认为风必须像暴风雨。我老师师从雅尔，雅尔主张轻快的春风。

english: I was taught the wind must be brisk, but never discourteous.
zh: 我学的是风要强劲，但不能无礼。

english: When I was young, I didn't realize there was so much philosophy in pantomime.
zh: 年轻时，我真没想到哑剧里有这么多哲学。

english: I don't see why I should have to do it.
zh: 我不明白为什么非得让我做。

english: What do you mean? It's your job.
zh: 什么意思？这是你的工作。

english: I didn't sign up for mopping latrines. I signed up to perpetrate despicable acts.
zh: 我加入这里不是为了拖洗厕所，而是为了实施卑劣行径。

english: Show me where in your contract it says you get to do only the fun stuff.
zh: 把合同拿来，指出哪一条写着你只能做有趣的工作。

english: Look, I'm an expert at what I do, which is causing misery and suffering. I was hired to make people unhappy. You want the latrine mopped? Hire a janitor.
zh: 听着，我是自己专业领域的专家，也就是制造痛苦和折磨。我受雇让人不幸。你想拖厕所？那就雇个清洁工。

english: Sure, as long as you don't mind taking a pay cut to cover their wages.
zh: 可以，只要你不介意降薪来支付他的工资。

english: Why should I have to pay for it?
Because you're the one that doesn't want to pitch in. The rest of us mop latrines when it's our turn. If you don't want to help, you can hire a janitor out of your own salary.
zh: 因为是你不肯出力。轮到我们时，其他人都会拖洗厕所。你要是不愿帮忙，就从自己的工资里雇个清洁工。

english: Why don't you tell Mr. Volkov about it. I'm sure he'll have an opinion on the subject.
zh: 你可以去跟沃尔科夫先生说，我相信他对此一定有自己的看法。

english: Suit yourself. Just keep in mind that people who don't mop, get mopped.
zh: 随你便。不过记住，不拖地的人，最后会被人拖走。

english: I've been thinking lately. You remember that guy Paulo?
zh: 我最近一直在想。你还记得那个叫保罗的家伙吗？

english: You mean the one that whacked Johnny in Spain?
zh: 你是说在西班牙干掉强尼的那个？

english: Who could forget? I remember last year at the Christmas party. You got a standing ovation after you described what you were gonna do to that guy. That was the nastiest, most graphic revenge fantasy I ever heard. Pure poetry.
zh: 谁会忘记？我还记得去年圣诞聚会，你描述准备怎么对付那家伙以后，全场起立鼓掌。那是我听过最恶毒、最血腥的复仇幻想，简直就是诗。

english: Well, like I said, I been thinking. I've changed my mind.
zh: 嗯，就像我说的，我一直在想。我改变主意了。

english: You mean you got something worse planned?
zh: 你是说，你想出了更狠的办法？

english: No, I mean I changed my mind.
zh: 不，我是说我改变主意了。

english: What's the point? It's not gonna bring Johnny back.
zh: 杀了他又有什么意义？强尼也回不来了。

english: That's what I used to tell myself, but that whole thing was strictly business. I loved Johnny like a brother, but he was a rat.
zh: 我以前也这么告诉自己，可那件事从头到尾都只是生意。我像亲兄弟一样爱强尼，但他确实是个叛徒。

english: Maybe so, but he was our friend.
zh: 也许吧，可他毕竟是我们的朋友。

english: What did I just say? I'd have done anything for that punk.
zh: 我刚才说什么了？我愿意为那个混蛋做任何事。

english: That's not what it sounds like to me.
Look, if I kill Paulo, who am I helping? Not Johnny. He's dead. I'd be doing it for me.
zh: 听着，要是我杀了保罗，我是在帮谁？不是强尼，他已经死了。我只是为了自己。

english: Yes, there is. See, I know Paulo didn't have nothing personal against Johnny. He was just following orders. How am I gonna feel better icing a guy that was just doing his job?
zh: 不，有问题。我知道保罗对强尼没有私人恩怨，他只是在执行命令。杀掉一个只是做本职工作的人，我怎么会感觉更好？

english: So ice the guy that hired him.
But Johnny had it coming. I wish things'd worked out different, but they didn't. If I start gunning people down, what will I accomplish?
zh: 可强尼是自作自受。我希望事情能有别的结局，但事实不是这样。要是我开始到处杀人，又能得到什么？

english: You wearing a bra under there? I'm starting to worry about your manhood. I mean, if you lost your taste for violence, maybe you should become a librarian or something.
zh: 你里面穿胸罩了吗？我开始担心你还算不算男人。我的意思是，你要是已经不喜欢暴力了，也许该去当图书管理员什么的。

english: Say that again. To my face. I dare you.
zh: 有种当着我的面再说一遍。我看你敢不敢。

english: Lighten up. I'm just having trouble digesting all this.
zh: 放松点，我只是一时消化不了这些。

english: It's simple. Johnny got planted because he was bad for business. If I turn around and whack the guy that whacked him, I'm turning a tragedy into a travesty.
zh: 很简单。强尼被埋了，是因为他妨碍生意。要是我转身干掉那个干掉他的人，我就是把一场悲剧变成一场闹剧。

english: What are you talking about? You're getting some well deserved payback.
zh: 你在说什么？你只是在讨回理所应得的报复。

english: It ain't well deserved! That's what I been trying to say. Johnny got himself killed by being a rat. If you want to blame somebody, blame him. If a guy shoots himself in the head, you don't punish the gun.
zh: 根本不是什么理所应得！我一直想说的就是这个。强尼因为当叛徒把自己害死了。要怪就怪他。一个人开枪打爆自己的脑袋，你不会去惩罚那把枪。

english: That's the difference between revenge and justice. I could get revenge by killing Paulo, but I wouldn't be serving justice. Justice is what got Johnny whacked in the first place.
zh: 这就是复仇和正义的区别。杀掉保罗能让我复仇，却不能伸张正义。强尼当初被干掉，本身就是正义的结果。

english: Did you hear that bastard was planning to do a presentation on Project: Lambda at this year's international crime conference?
zh: 听说那个混蛋准备在今年的国际犯罪大会上介绍拉姆达计划了吗？

english: He wasn't even on the project.
zh: 他压根没参与那个项目。

english: I know! Can you believe it.
So they talked him out of doing it?
zh: 所以他们说服他放弃了？

english: Nah, they just threw him to the sharks.
zh: 没有，他们直接把他扔去喂鲨鱼了。

english: Why do you think there is such a low ratio of women in the criminal industry?
zh: 你觉得犯罪行业里的女性比例为什么这么低？
你不觉得是性别歧视吗？

english: I'm sure there's some of that, but it's not like we get a lot of resumes from women.
zh: 肯定有一点，但我们收到的女性简历本来就不多。

english: Maybe it's socialization. Maybe girls grow up thinking crime is for men, so they don't consider it as a career option.
zh: 也许是社会化造成的。女孩从小就觉得犯罪是男人的事业，所以根本不会把它当成职业选择。

english: I'll ask my sister what she thinks.
zh: 我去问问我妹妹怎么想。

english: Whatever happened to their Eiffel Tower plan? Weren't they going to strap rockets to it and fly it to the moon?
zh: 他们的埃菲尔铁塔计划后来怎么样了？不是准备给塔绑上火箭，送到月球吗？

english: Budget overruns. I hear they're working on a plan to replace all the paintings in the Louvre with photographs of Elvis Presley.
zh: 预算超支了。听说他们正在计划把卢浮宫里的所有画作换成猫王的照片。

english: Are you sure? That sounds a lot like the job in Barcelona.
zh: 你确定？这听起来很像巴塞罗那那次行动。

english: They're calling it a spiritual sequel.
How disappointing. I was looking forward to something a little more innovative.
zh: 真令人失望。我还期待更有创意的东西。

english: They can still innovate. Just because it's a follow-up doesn't mean it's going to be identical. Think of it as a variation on a theme.
zh: 他们仍然可以创新。续作不代表必须完全一样，可以把它看成同一主题的变奏。

english: That morale officer is a serious liability.
zh: 那个士气官会带来严重问题。

english: Aw, come on, she's not that bad.
How am I supposed to feel intimidating in a pink uniform? And what kind of self respecting evil organization has a slogan like: Good at being bad. Bad at being good?
zh: 穿着粉色制服，我怎么可能显得吓人？而且哪个有自尊的邪恶组织会用这种口号：“擅长作恶，不擅长行善”？

english: I kind of like it. Besides, it got shot down anyway.
zh: 我还挺喜欢的，反正最后也被否决了。

english: That's not my point. It never should have been proposed in the first place. Where's the menace?
zh: 这不是重点。这个提案从一开始就不该出现。威慑力在哪里？

english: Give her a break. This is her first time in a criminal organization. She used to work at a breakfast cereal company.
zh: 放她一马吧，这是她第一次进入犯罪组织工作。她以前在早餐麦片公司上班。

english: What can I do for you?
You can gauge your accuracy by your crosshair. The more blurred it becomes, the less accurate your shots will be. Rapid movement will tend to foul your aim.
zh: 你可以通过准星判断准确度。准星越模糊，射击越不准确。快速移动通常会影响瞄准。

english: You've entered a potential Hiding Place. If you stand perfectly still, you'll become hidden, which means enemies won't be able to see you unless they come very close. You'll remain hidden as long as you keep quiet. That means you can still Sneak or Crouch-Walk, but be careful not to cause any disturbances.
zh: 你进入了一个可能的藏身处。只要完全静止，就会进入隐藏状态，这意味着除非敌人靠得很近，否则看不到你。只要保持安静，就能继续隐藏。也就是说，你仍然可以潜行或蹲着行走，但注意别制造任何骚动。

english: You have lock pick. Use it on door knob.
zh: 你有开锁器，用在门把手上。

english: Use radio to contact your boss.
zh: 用无线电联系你的上司。

english: There's small Soviet outpost to north. You can maybe find gas there.
zh: 北边有个小型苏军前哨站，也许能在那里找到汽油。

english: This path leads back to the plane. There's nothing worth seeing in that direction.
zh: 这条路通回飞机，那个方向没有值得看的东西。

english: The bridge is just ahead! Once you cross it, look for the narrow path on your left. It should give you access to the underpinnings.
zh: 桥就在前面！过桥后寻找左侧的狭窄小路，那里应该能通到桥底支撑结构。

english: Come back later. This could take a while.
zh: 晚点再来，这可能要花些时间。

english: Thank you for rescuing me. I'll go back to dacha. I can follow road if you open gate.
zh: 谢谢你救了我。我会返回别墅，只要你打开大门，我就能沿公路回去。

english: Let me know when coast is clear.
zh: 确认外面安全后告诉我。
告诉我什么时候可以走。

english: Don't leave me here! They'll torture me!
zh: 别把我留在这里！他们会拷问我的！

english: Thank you! I'll wait at dacha.
That's the communications relay tower above you on your right.
zh: 你右上方那座就是通信中继塔。

english: Refer to your map to keep from getting lost.
Commandeer a snowmobile and get back to the plane! Hurry!
zh: 夺一辆雪地摩托，赶回飞机！快！

english: Bad news! H.A.R.M. agents arrived before you. They're going to blow up the plane! Your pilot is hiding, but you're in trouble if they find him.
zh: 坏消息！H.A.R.M.特工比你先到了，他们准备炸毁飞机！飞行员躲起来了，但要是被他们找到，你就麻烦了。

english: The main road has been cut off! You'll have to find another way out of the area!
zh: 主路被封锁了！你必须另找一条路离开这里！

english: It's a safe bet the police will be looking for you now that they think you killed Kamal's associate. Stay out of their way.
zh: 警方现在以为是你杀了卡马尔的同伴，肯定正在搜捕你。离他们远点。

english: To use your eavesdropping bug, simply fasten it to a telephone receiver. Make sure you find a place to hide until the conversation ends, then activate the bug to play back the recording.
zh: 使用窃听器时，只需将它安装到电话听筒上。找地方躲到通话结束，然后启动窃听器播放录音。

english: You may visit the restroom, but you're not allowed beyond the security gates.
zh: 你可以使用洗手间，但不许越过安全门。

english: As I explained, you're not allowed past the security gates.
zh: 我已经解释过了，你不能通过安全门。

english: I told you to stay here!
Your rambunctious behavior is beginning to irritate me.
zh: 你这种胡闹行为开始让我恼火了。

english: If you're seen, the guards will attempt to apprehend you. Stay out of their clutches or they'll escort you back to the lobby!
zh: 要是被看到，守卫会试图逮捕你。别落到他们手里，否则他们会把你押回大厅！

english: Here's your stupid purse. I can't believe you made me stand here with that girly little thing. It's unseemly.
zh: 拿着你的蠢手提包。我真不敢相信你让我拿着这么娘气的小玩意儿站在这里，太不像话了。

english: Look what you did, you idiot!
zh: 看看你干的好事，你这个白痴！

english: MY fault!?! You weren't even looking where you were going!
zh: 我的错？！你走路时根本没看路！

english: THAT is an exaggeration. Maybe I looked away for a second, but you're the one who came racing around the corner like a maniac!
zh: 这话太夸张了。我也许只是移开视线一秒，可是你像疯子一样冲过拐角才撞上来的！

english: I thought I saw a monkey.
zh: 我好像看到了一只猴子。

english: So did I! That's why I was looking back.
zh: 我也看到了！所以我才回头。

english: Likely story! Why would a monkey chase YOU?
zh: 这借口谁信！猴子为什么要追你？

english: Sometimes they smell my bananas. Last week a mob of them attacked me. They stole half my stock!
zh: 有时它们会闻到我的香蕉。上周一群猴子袭击了我，抢走了我一半的货！

english: They're always after my mangoes too.
zh: 它们也总惦记我的芒果。

english: It seems we have a common enemy, my friend.
zh: 看来我们有共同的敌人，朋友。

english: Can it be a coincidence that two fruit vendors should glimpse monkeys at the exact same moment, at the exact same street corner, causing them both to panic simultaneously, resulting in a collision that disables both carts?
zh: 两个水果摊贩在同一时刻、同一街角同时看见猴子，同时惊慌，最后撞在一起导致两辆推车都坏掉，这真会是巧合吗？

english: You mean THEY engineered this? Those BASTARDS!!!
zh: 你是说，这一切都是它们策划的？那群混蛋！！！

english: Be wary, my friend. They may attack at any moment!
zh: 小心，朋友。它们随时可能发动袭击！

english: Watch out for snipers on the balconies!
He's trying to block the street!
Shoot the lock on that gate!
Hold tight! Sharp turn dead ahead!
Don't expect me to hold your purse for you this time.
zh: 这次别指望我替你拿手提包。

english: Help me! The gate is locked! There's nowhere to run!
zh: 救救我！大门锁住了！无处可逃！

english: Run for your life! It's right behind me!
Hurry! The ice cream is melting!
It's no use! The fire is out of control!
Didn't you hear? They caught him trying to arrange an interview with Vengeance Factory. He had the plans for Project Epsilon in his portfolio.  So they turned him into a Man-Crate.
zh: 你没听说？他们发现他试图安排去“复仇工厂”面试，公文包里还装着伊普西隆计划的图纸，所以把他改造成了人箱。

english: Jeez. Serves him right. That's the problem with this industry. Criminals just have too many entitlement issues to put the TEAM first.
zh: 天哪，活该。这就是这个行业的问题，罪犯总觉得自己应得一切，不愿把团队放在第一位。
科尼利厄斯·菲奇平斯，三等少尉。

english: Boy, Kitchener's really bucking for a promotion. He's been begging me to transfer him to the Director's office as an end table.
zh: 基奇纳为了升职真是拼命。他一直求我把他调到局长办公室去当边桌。

english: Can you blame him? Let me tell you something, pal, life as a Man-Crate isn't exactly glamorous.
zh: 能怪他吗？朋友，我告诉你，人箱的生活一点也不光鲜。

english: Hey, no disrespect intended. I just think he's going about it all wrong. You do a good job as furniture, it could turn into a career. The most you can look forward to is getting moved to a nicer room. Me? I'd teach myself how to roll so I could catch some spies.
zh: 嘿，我没有不尊重你的意思。我只是觉得他的方法完全错了。家具做得好，也可能发展成职业。你最多只盼着被搬到更好的房间。换作我，我会自学滚动，好抓住几个间谍。

english: Are you feeling any better today, Chuck?
zh: 查克，你今天感觉好一点了吗？

english: No, my deformed friend. Like all quantities, horror has its ultimate. And I'm that.
zh: 没有，我那畸形的朋友。正如所有事物都有极限，恐怖也有它的终极形态，而我就是那个终极。

english: Hey, that's from The Brain That Wouldn't Die, right? I love that movie. I never thought I'd be able to relate to Jan in the Pan.
zh: 嘿，这句出自《不死之脑》，对吧？我超喜欢那部电影。没想到有一天我竟然能理解“盘中珍”的感受。

english: Hold on, Mikey! I'll figure something out.
zh: 撑住，米奇！我会想出办法。
离我远点！你要把我压扁了！

english: Welcome to the Man-Handler, H.A.R.M.'s latest all-purpose death trap and automated torture device. Let's take a look at what today's victim has in store, shall we?
zh: 欢迎来到“辣手摧花机”——H.A.R.M.最新的多用途死亡陷阱兼自动拷问装置。我们来看看今天的受害者将经历什么，好吗？

english: Man-Crate! That's right, folks, the victim is about to become a living block of human misery. The perfect punishment for all those naughty boys and girls who need a reminder of how completely and utterly insignificant they are. The procedure is even 65 percent reversible, which means you can reward your Man-Crates for good behavior by turning them into pale, quivering shadows of their former selves!
zh: 人箱！没错，各位，受害者即将变成一块活生生的人类苦难方块。对于那些需要被提醒自己何等渺小、何等微不足道的坏男孩坏女孩来说，这是最完美的惩罚。这个过程甚至有65%的可逆性，也就是说，你可以奖励表现良好的人箱，把他们还原成昔日自我的苍白、颤抖残影！

english: Heat up the griddle and get your spatulas ready! We're making Man-Cakes!
zh: 把铁板烧热，准备好锅铲！我们要做人肉煎饼了！

english: How about a bowl of chunky Manhattan-style Man-Chowder!?
zh: 来一碗大块曼哈顿风味人肉杂烩汤怎么样！？

english: Mama mia! It looks like today's victim is in for MAXIMUM PUNISHMENT! Get ready for the main course, ladies and gentlemen! We're having spaghetti with Man-Sauce!
zh: 我的天！看来今天的受害者要遭受最高等级惩罚！各位先生女士，准备迎接主菜！今晚我们吃人肉酱意大利面！

english: First, the victim will face the crushing agony of the mighty TENDERIZERS!!! Next up are the HOWLING SAWBLADES!!! Followed by the infernal FLAME JETS!!! And leading finally to the swirling agony of the MAN-BLENDER!!!
zh: 首先，受害者将承受强力嫩肉锤的粉碎痛苦！！！接着是呼啸的圆锯片！！！然后是地狱般的喷火器！！！最后迎来人肉搅拌机的旋转折磨！！！

english: This will be the first time the Man-Handler has been used at its highest setting. There's a lot of anticipation in the air today, ladies and gentlemen. Well, let's MAN-HANDLE!
zh: 这是“辣手摧花机”首次以最高档位运行。各位先生女士，今天现场充满期待。那么，让我们狠狠收拾他吧！

english: We seem to be experiencing technical difficulties.
zh: 看来我们遇到了技术问题。

english: Director, there's a call... there's an urgent telephone call. For you.
zh: 局长，有电话……有一通紧急电话找您。

english: I don't care if he IS the screenwriter's nephew. He'd better end up on the cutting room floor or you'll be hearing from my agent. Yes, Bernard, I realize that, but he's dreadful. Have you seen the dailies? He keeps looking at the camera. I only agreed to do this picture because you begged me. You begged me, Bernard. I was up for a part in The Italian Job, but I turned it down. For you. I could be working with Michael Caine and Noel Coward. Instead I'm stuck with Terence bloody Sloggins the bloody screenwriter's bloody nephew. Goodbye, Bernard. I'm hanging up on you now.
zh: 我不管他是不是编剧的侄子，他最好被剪掉，否则我的经纪人会找你算账。是的，伯纳德，我明白，但他演得太糟了。你看过样片吗？他一直盯着镜头。我之所以答应拍这部电影，只是因为你求我。你求我的，伯纳德。我原本有机会参演《意大利任务》，却为了你拒绝了。我本可以和迈克尔·凯恩、诺埃尔·科沃德合作，现在却得和该死的特伦斯·斯洛金斯——那个该死编剧的该死侄子——困在一起。再见，伯纳德，我现在要挂你电话了。

english: I can't breathe! I can't breathe! Can someone move me over by a window!?!
zh: 我喘不过气！我喘不过气！谁能把我挪到窗户旁边？！

english: Pipe down, boxy. Some of us are trying to sleep.
zh: 安静点，箱子。我们有些人还想睡觉。

english: So you developed this new artificial lava?
zh: 所以这种新型人造熔岩是你研发的？

english: Heck, yeah. It's pretty damn spiffy compared to that crap we used to have.
zh: 当然，这比我们以前用的破玩意儿酷多了。

english: It can handle temperatures up to 343 kelvins. The previous substance deconstituted at around 313 kelvins. I take baths hotter than that.
zh: 它能承受高达343开尔文的温度。以前那种材料大约在313开尔文就会分解，我洗澡水都比那热。

english: The only problem is it doesn't really look like lava.
zh: 唯一的问题是，它看起来根本不像熔岩。

english: That's actually by design. Our first few prototypes were very naturalistic, but the focus group results weren't where they needed to be. So we said hell with it. Let's just concentrate on making it look cool.
zh: 这是故意设计成这样的。最初几个原型非常写实，但焦点小组的结果达不到要求，所以我们说去他的，专心让它看起来够酷就行。

english: What was wrong with the realistic stuff?

People take reality for granted, so it's hard to impress them with your garden variety liquid magma. Why do you think we have our headquarters in underground caverns? It'd be a lot cheaper and more convenient to lease an office building, but then you get potential clients who don't think you're evil enough for the really high profile operations.
zh: 人们把现实视为理所当然，所以普通液态岩浆很难给他们留下印象。你以为我们为什么把总部设在地下洞穴里？租一栋办公楼便宜又方便得多，可那样潜在客户会觉得你不够邪恶，不能承接真正高调的行动。

english: Take a look at the latest Criminality Monthly. They profile two evil organizations: Misery, Incorporated and Fist of Injustice. If you look at their CVs...
zh: 看看最新一期《犯罪月刊》。里面介绍了两个邪恶组织：“悲惨公司”和“不义之拳”。要是看他们的履历……

english: Curriculum vitae. Like a resume. Anyway, Misery, Inc. is a way more sophisticated outfit. Fist of Injustice is strictly third rate: kidnappings, extortion, the petty kind of stuff any guy with a two car garage and a mental disorder can pull off. But they've got a much better rep in the criminal industry.
zh: 个人简历，和求职简历差不多。总之，“悲惨公司”是复杂得多的组织。“不义之拳”完全是三流货色，只会绑架、勒索和那些有双车位车库、再加点精神问题的人都能干的小勾当。可他们在犯罪行业的名声好得多。

english: No kidding. I thought they were pretty much on par with us.
zh: 不会吧，我还以为他们和我们差不多。

english: We've got more evil in our daycare center than they have in their entire organization. But they hired a top rate design firm to help them with their lair.
zh: 我们托儿所里的邪恶程度都比他们整个组织高。可他们请了一家顶级设计公司帮忙打造巢穴。

english: Is that the place that's sort of a science fiction medieval dungeon kind of thing?
zh: 就是那个像科幻中世纪地牢混合体的地方吗？

english: That's the one. I'll bet it's all held together by strings and chewing gum, but it sure impresses the media.
zh: 没错。我敢说那地方全靠绳子和口香糖撑着，可媒体就是吃这一套。

english: Look for caches of Anti Super Soldier Serum! You'll need the serum to get rid of the invasion force!
zh: 寻找抗超级士兵血清储藏点！你需要血清来消灭入侵部队！

english: So what happened, anyway? I thought you were going to guard the flag.
zh: 所以到底发生了什么？你不是要守护旗帜吗？

english: I single-handedly fought off a super soldier invasion and you couldn't even handle one little self-infatuated sissy with a target pistol.
zh: 我单枪匹马击退了超级士兵入侵，你却连一个拿靶枪、自恋得要命的娘娘腔都对付不了。

english: Maybe you would have heard him coming if you didn't have your head up your arse.
zh: 要不是你把脑袋塞进自己屁股里，也许早就听见他靠近了。

english: Have some sympathy! I was shot! Multiple times!
zh: 有点同情心！我中枪了！还中了好几枪！

english: Don't you mock me, woman. It stings!
zh: 别嘲笑我，女人，真的很疼！

english: Is that so? Well, I was zapped by a laser beam. You do you think THAT feels? Of course, after being impaled on a sword and carried off by a tornado, it's really not so bad.
zh: 是吗？我可是被激光束击中了。你觉得那是什么感觉？当然，在被剑刺穿、又被龙卷风卷走之后，其实也不算太糟。

english: You're lucky I'm bleeding to death or I'd teach you a thing or two about respect.
zh: 要不是我快失血而死，我一定教教你什么叫尊重。

english: All right, maybe that's a slight exaggeration.
zh: 好吧，也许稍微夸张了一点。

english: Not that it makes a difference. I'll take you on any time, anywhere.
zh: 反正没区别。无论何时何地，我都敢和你较量。

english: I'll tell you what the password is. It's... Balaji Malpani better shape up or he's going to die a very slow, painful death. Got that!?! Good BYE!!!
zh: 我告诉你密码。密码是……巴拉吉·马尔帕尼最好赶紧振作，否则他会死得非常缓慢、非常痛苦。听明白了吗？！再见！！！

english: Head through this gate! It leads out to the street!
zh: 穿过这扇门！它通往街道！

english: I'm on my coffee break. Come back later.
zh: 我正在休息喝咖啡，晚点再来。

english: The helicopter's on its way! You'll have to hold out until it arrives. We think enemy reinforcements are closing in on your position, so brace yourself for a fight!
zh: 直升机正在赶来！你必须坚守到它抵达。我们认为敌方援军正在接近你的位置，做好战斗准备！

english: It's too late to rescue Armstrong. Find out where they're taking him!
zh: 现在救阿姆斯特朗已经太迟了。查明他们要把他带到哪里！

english: We're airdropping explosives to you now! Recover them and place them around the compound.
zh: 我们现在正向你空投炸药！找到炸药，并安放在设施周围。

english: Intercept teams, report to Temporary Director Lawrie in the lobby.
zh: 各拦截小队，前往大厅向劳里临时局长报到。

english: Rescue any hostages and get rid of those filthy mimes!
zh: 救出所有人质，并解决那些肮脏的哑剧演员！

english: Cate, where are you going? Your pilot is still a prisoner!
zh: 凯特，你要去哪儿？你的飞行员还被关押着！

english: A man with a carnation? Haven't seen him.
zh: 戴康乃馨的男人？没见过。

english: They say that murder victim was stabbed, shot, and stomped on by an elephant. How horrible!
zh: 听说那个谋杀案受害者被人捅了、枪击了，还被大象踩过。太可怕了！

english: No, I haven't seen anyone wearing a carnation.
zh: 不，我没见过戴康乃馨的人。

english: Need someone to show you around? I'VE been around.
zh: 需要有人带你四处看看吗？我可是很有经验。

english: Maybe I can clear my calendar tonight and take you to dinner.
zh: 也许今晚我可以腾出时间，带你去吃晚饭。

english: Perhaps you can ask the flower vendor.
Yes, I saw a man with a carnation. He was here a short time ago.
zh: 对，我见过一个戴康乃馨的男人，他不久前还在这里。

english: I heard someone was murdered near here!
Wearing a carnation? No, I'm sorry.
Did you hear about the murder? What is this neighborhood coming to?
zh: 听说那起谋杀了吗？这个街区到底怎么了？

english: Why don't you ask the florist?
zh: 为什么不去问花店老板？

english: The man was about 6 feet tall with a bushy red beard, wearing a skirt.
zh: 男人大约六英尺高，留着浓密红胡子，穿着裙子。

english: I don't know much about women's fashion. Anyway, the girl looked European with brown hair, an orange shirt, and striped pants. She was the one with the gun.
zh: 我不懂女装。总之，那个女人看起来像欧洲人，棕色头发，穿橙色上衣和条纹裤子。拿枪的是她。

english: Just arrest them. We'll sort out the details later.
zh: 先逮捕他们，细节以后再弄清楚。

english: Yes, a man bought a pink carnation from me just a few minutes ago. Are you his friend? He dropped that.
zh: 是的，几分钟前有个男人从我这里买了一朵粉色康乃馨。你是他的朋友吗？他掉了这个。

english: Who's been eating my mango chutney!?! My mother made that for ME!!!
zh: 谁吃了我的芒果酸辣酱？！那是我妈妈专门给我做的！！！

english: Where is that idiot woman? She was supposed to be here 20 minutes ago.
zh: 那个蠢女人去哪儿了？她本该二十分钟前就到。

english: A man was killed behind the Hotel Happy Guest! They say it was a gang of bandits!
zh: 有人在快乐宾客酒店后面被杀了！听说是一群强盗干的！

english: I'm told a family was mauled by wild dogs at the Hotel Happy Guest. How tragic!
zh: 听说有一家人在快乐宾客酒店被野狗咬伤了，真悲惨。

english: I wish those gangsters had taken over a different movie theater. This one had such comfortable seats.
zh: 真希望那些匪徒占领的是另一家电影院，这家的座椅原本特别舒服。

english: You, there. I bring word from Kamal. He wants to meet you.
zh: 你，过来。我带来了卡马尔的消息，他想见你。

english: Sadly, I forgot where I saw him. You'll have to find him yourself.
zh: 遗憾的是，我忘了在哪里见到他，你只能自己找。

english: Like you, I am a victim of injustice. I have been driven away from my precious gate by nasty policemen.
zh: 和你一样，我也是不公正待遇的受害者。那些讨厌的警察把我从心爱的城门赶走了。

english: I realize you must find me irresistible, but I'm tired of talking to you.
zh: 我知道你肯定觉得我无法抗拒，但我已经厌倦和你说话。

english: The acting was terrible! And the special effects? The blood looked like red paint!
zh: 演技糟透了！还有特效呢？那些血看起来就像红油漆！

english: It was arterial spray. It's brighter because it contains more oxygen. And how can you criticize the acting considering the movies YOU like?! I give up.
zh: 那是动脉喷血。因为含氧量更高，所以颜色更鲜艳。考虑到你喜欢的那些电影，你怎么有脸批评演技？！我不说了。

english: My favorite part is where she starts to undress and then the truck drives through the wall. I was laughing so hard soda shot out of my nose.
zh: 我最喜欢她开始脱衣服，然后卡车撞穿墙壁的那一段。我笑得太厉害，汽水都从鼻子里喷出来了。

english: I like the scene in the bar with the guy with the thing and the other guy with the eye patch? I thought I was going to have to be hospitalized from laughing too much. What a great movie.
zh: 我喜欢酒吧那场，有个拿着那东西的人，还有另一个戴眼罩的人？我笑得差点需要住院。真是部好电影。

english: You, there! I said put out this fire!
Hello, Agent Archer. How are you today?
zh: 你好，阿彻特工。今天过得怎么样？

english: Are you, are you actually talking to me? Wow.
zh: 你……你真的在和我说话吗？哇。

english: Hi, Cate. Mildred said to thank you for the flowers. She's feeling much better.
zh: 嗨，凯特。米尔德里德让我谢谢你的花，她感觉好多了。

english: I don't feel well at all.
It's the girl from the poster!
Why are you trying to intimidate me?
It's the girl from the poster!
Please don't point that thing at me.
zh: 请不要拿那东西指着我。

The Director has stated that should the spy escape, the entire clan will be subjected to a punitive poetry recitation featuring his mother's collected works, including her epic, ＂My Ungrateful Son,＂ her valiant but otherwise inexcusable contribution to the Icelandic saga tradition.

For the sake of your colleagues, please observe the strictest vigilance.

Haruko Muroi
Assistant Administrator

忍者一族备忘录：惩罚性诗歌朗诵@全体族人注意

局长表示，如果间谍逃脱，全族都将被迫参加惩罚性诗歌朗诵会，内容包括他母亲的作品全集，其中还有史诗《我那忘恩负义的儿子》——这是她对冰岛萨迦传统英勇但完全不可原谅的贡献。

为了同伴着想，请保持最高程度的警戒。

室井春子
助理管理员

助理管理员

Soviet Memo: Drowning@To: All Personnel
From: Human Resources

The productivity of our great installation has suffered due to the unfortunate, probably accidental drowning deaths of comrades Zymlyanoi and Alexei last week. Patrols are hereby prohibited from taking shortcuts across the frozen lake until further notice.

You are being watched.
zh:
苏联备忘录：溺水@收件人：全体人员
发件人：人力资源部

上周，兹姆利亚诺伊同志和阿列克谢同志不幸且很可能意外溺亡，导致我们伟大设施的生产效率受到影响。即日起，巡逻人员禁止抄近路穿越结冰湖面，直至另行通知。

你正在受到监视。

english:
UNITY Memo: Welder@Agent Archer,

I've added a little something extra to your hairspray. Use it to weld off certain types of metal locks and hinges. Good luck!

Santa
zh:
UNITY备忘录：焊接器@阿彻特工：

我在你的发胶里加了一点额外功能。用它可以焊断某些类型的金属锁和铰链。祝你好运！

圣诞老人

english:
Soviet paperwork: Cigarette rations@To: All Personnel

Addendum 90/C-4 of the Personal Hygiene & Fitness Manual (volume 7, page 3,483) stipulates a daily ration of 18 cigarettes per soldier. Exceeding this allowance is punishable by death, unless the cigarettes are stolen (which is punishable by torture and death) or given freely by a comrade (punishable by torture but not by death). Failure to meet the 18 cigarette quota is also punishable by death.

You are being watched.
zh:
苏联文件：香烟配给@收件人：全体人员

《个人卫生与体能手册》第90/C-4号补充条款（第7卷，第3483页）规定，每名士兵每日配给18支香烟。超过配额者将被处死，除非香烟是偷来的——这种情况将受到拷问并处死；或由同志自愿赠送——这种情况只受拷问，不处死。未达到每日18支香烟配额者同样将被处死。

你正在受到监视。

english:
UNITY Memo: Mission brief@Agent Archer

Our intelligence suggests that getting into the facility will be much simpler than getting out. Therefore, your first objective will be to sabotage the enemy's communications and power supply.

You'll also need to plant charges at a bridge near your current position for detonation on your return. Destroying the bridge should cut off any pursuit.

I've marked the position of a hunting cabin where we've left you some additional supplies, including a sniper rifle that should come in handy.

Santa.
zh:
UNITY备忘录：任务简报@阿彻特工：

我们的情报显示，进入设施会比离开容易得多。因此，你的首要目标是破坏敌方通信和电力供应。

你还需要在当前位置附近的一座桥上安放炸药，返程时引爆。摧毁桥梁应该可以切断追兵。

我已经标出一座狩猎木屋的位置，我们在那里给你留了额外补给，包括一支应该很有用的狙击步枪。

圣诞老人
note: preserve @ separators; line breaks are escaped as \n

english:
UNITY Memo: Utility launcher@Agent Archer,

I've enclosed a standard issue CT-180 Utility Launcher with 10 reusable tranquilizer darts. Each dart delivers a powerful sedative that will put a target to sleep instantly. Note that unconscious enemies will awaken eventually.

You can use the Change Ammo key (default: F) to cycle between your Tranquilizer and Tracking Bug ammunition. Remember that you can also go to the Equipment screen to switch ammunition while the game is paused.

Santa
zh:

你可以使用“切换弹药”键（默认：F），在麻醉飞镖和追踪器弹药之间切换。请记住，游戏暂停时也可以进入“装备”界面切换弹药。

圣诞老人

english:
Soviet paperwork: Coffee consumption@To: All Personnel

Addendum 90/C-4 of the Personal Hygiene & Fitness Manual (volume 12, page 4) specifies that every soldier may consume no more and no less than 9 cups of coffee per day. Personnel caught diluting their coffee with water or other liquid substances will be shot on sight. Anyone caught pouring coffee into planters or down drains will be executed by lethal injection. Giving your coffee to a dog is punishable by filing duty in the Main Records Building.

You are being watched.

I am writing to request access to the M-9 Data Processing Unit area in the Main Records Building. I have been reassigned to Project: Omega, but cannot report for duty without proper security clearance. I have already submitted several requests for clearance, but they were denied due to the fact that I do not have access to the M-9 Data Processing Unit area. I am unsure how to proceed.

Respectfully,
Corporal Butsenko

I am afraid I cannot approve your request for access to the M-9 Data Processing Unit area. Lieutenant Guniko

english:
Document: Readiness Report Part I@Soviet Military Readiness Report

Part I. Background Information

This report has been prepared in accordance with the wishes of General Nikolai Zhukov, who is a very nice general and one of my personal heroes. Did you know that General Zhukov was a decorated veteran of the Great Patriotic War? It's true! He is also an avid botanist with a special interest in cruciferous plants, which I too like very much. Especially chard.
zh:
文件：战备报告第1部分@苏军战备报告

第1部分：背景资料

本报告依照尼古拉·朱可夫将军的意愿编写。他是一位非常亲切的将军，也是我个人崇拜的英雄之一。你知道朱可夫将军是卫国战争中荣获勋章的老兵吗？这是真的！他还是一位热衷植物学的爱好者，尤其喜爱十字花科植物，而我也非常喜欢，特别是牛皮菜。

english:
Soviet Report: BLINDSIDE@To: General Zhukov
From: KLAUS

BLINDSIDE is proceeding on schedule. Of all our illustrious operations against the Main Adversary, none has ever been as bold or ambitious as this, nor as guaranteed to secure such absolute victory for the Soviet Union and total humiliation for our enemies. I shall report again once I've made contact with MR. BIG and outlined our proposal. I'm sure he will be most receptive to our generous offer.
zh:
苏联报告：侧击行动@收件人：朱可夫将军
发件人：克劳斯

“侧击行动”正在按计划推进。在我们针对主要敌人的所有光辉行动中，从未有任何一次如此大胆、如此雄心勃勃，也从未有任何行动如此有把握为苏联赢得绝对胜利，并让敌人彻底蒙羞。等我与“大人物”接触并说明提案后，会再次汇报。我相信他一定会欣然接受我们慷慨的条件。
note: preserve @ separators; line breaks are escaped as \n

english:
Soviet Report: BLINDSIDE stalled@To: General Zhukov
From: KLAUS

BLINDSIDE is dead in the water. I suspect treachery, as my attempts to meet with MR. BIG have been repeatedly foiled. The Main Adversary must have learned of our intentions to recruit President Johnson, which explains why I cannot schedule an appointment with him. I am confident that even a five minute interview would have been sufficient to turn him to our cause, but the Americans are extremely crafty. Trust no one.
zh:
苏联报告：侧击行动受阻@收件人：朱可夫将军
发件人：克劳斯

“侧击行动”已经彻底停滞。我怀疑有人背叛，因为我多次试图与“大人物”会面，却一再遭到阻挠。主要敌人一定已经获悉我们准备招募约翰逊总统的意图，这就解释了为什么我无法预约他。我确信只需五分钟面谈，就足以让他加入我们，但美国人极其狡猾。不要相信任何人。

note: preserve @ separators

english:
Document: Readiness Report Part II@Soviet Military Readiness Report

Part II. Conclusions

As has already been stated, General Zhukov is a most admirable individual whose numerous outstanding achievements provide an excellent example for all good Soviets to follow. He is fond of cross country skiing, Siberian folk music, and romantic evenings on the shore of Lake Baikal with any of his various mistresses, including my wife, Nadia. In conclusion, I think it's clear that the Soviet military is blessed with a leader whose wisdom is all the readiness we could ever ask for.
zh:
文件：战备报告第2部分@苏军战备报告

第2部分：结论

正如前文所述，朱可夫将军是一位极其令人敬佩的人物，他众多卓越成就为所有优秀苏联公民树立了绝佳榜样。他喜爱越野滑雪、西伯利亚民间音乐，以及和众多情妇中的任何一位在贝加尔湖畔度过浪漫夜晚，其中也包括我的妻子娜迪娅。总而言之，我认为很明显，苏军有幸拥有这样一位领袖，他的智慧就是我们所需的全部战备。

Soviet Memo: Sabotage@TOP SECRET ANTI-SABOTAGE REPORT

Comrade Karpov,

After inspecting your facility, I would conclude that the only serious threat of sabotage you face would arise from a demolition charge placed inside the access panel between the two main generators. Obviously, the likelihood that a decadent capitalist spy would recognize this opportunity is virtually non-existent.

I need hardly mention that this report should be kept under lock and key.

Corporal Butsenko

不用我提醒，这份报告必须锁好保管。

布岑科下士

english:
Letter: Anya's Visit@Dearest Sergei,

Thank you for your kind letter. Of course I forgive you. I understand that you were drunk. Besides, the scar tissue is hardly noticeable.

I can't believe you got me three pairs of American blue jeans! I miss you so much. I must come visit at once! You're sure they are the right size? Oh, but how I long to see you. I'm so excited! How I've dreamed of blue jeans!

Anya
zh:
信件：安雅来访@最亲爱的谢尔盖：

谢谢你亲切的来信，我当然原谅你。我明白你当时喝醉了，而且疤痕组织几乎看不出来。

真不敢相信你给我弄到了三条美国牛仔裤！我太想你了，必须马上去看你！你确定尺寸合适吗？啊，我多么渴望见到你。我太兴奋了！我做梦都想要牛仔裤！

安雅
note: preserve @ separators; line breaks are escaped as \n

english:
Letter: Anya's Reassurance@Darling Sergei,

How can you even think such a thing, my sweet?! I'm excited about the jeans, of course, but it's YOU I want to see. I'm not the kind of woman to hold a grudge against a man for breaking a bottle of vodka over her head for no reason! I think of those few days I spent in the hospital as a much needed vacation. And the doctor says the seizures shouldn't last much longer! Aren't you excited to see me in American denim?

Anya
zh:
信件：安雅的安慰@亲爱的谢尔盖：

亲爱的，你怎么会这么想？！我当然对牛仔裤很兴奋，但我真正想见的是你。我可不是那种会因为一个男人毫无缘由地把伏特加酒瓶砸在自己头上，就一直怀恨在心的女人！我把住院的那几天当成一次十分需要的假期。而且医生说抽搐应该不会持续太久了！想到我穿着美国牛仔布的样子，你难道不兴奋吗？

安雅
note: preserve @ separators; line breaks are escaped as \n

english:
Letter: Anya's Forgiveness@Sergei, my love,

I can't wait to see you! It is thoughtful of you to leave the back door unlocked, but I'm concerned about the electrified security fence. Remember what happened to poor Yuri's wife last summer? Although the new hairstyle suits her. My brother said you could pour some sugar in the fuel tank of generator that powers the security fence since it's on a separate circuit. He used to be stationed there.

Anya
zh:
信件：安雅的宽恕@谢尔盖，我的爱人：

我等不及要见你了！你特意不锁后门很体贴，但我担心带电的安全围栏。还记得去年夏天可怜的尤里妻子发生了什么吗？不过新发型倒挺适合她。我哥哥说，给安全围栏供电的发电机使用独立回路，可以往燃料箱里倒些糖。他以前就驻扎在那里。

安雅

english: UNITY Manual: Security cameras@SECURITY CAMERAS\n\nIf a security camera spots you, an alarm will sound, bringing reinforcements to search the area. It will take the camera a moment to focus and identify you as a threat, so learn to duck back out of sight the moment you hear the distinctive mechanical whine of the lens turning. Because cameras are monitored remotely, destroying them will raise an alarm, but you can use special camera disabling ammunition for your CT-180 Utility Launcher to render them inoperative.
zh: UNITY手册：监控摄像机@监控摄像机\n\n如果监控摄像机发现你，就会拉响警报，引来援军搜索该区域。摄像机需要片刻才能对焦，并将你识别为威胁，因此一旦听到镜头转动时独特的机械声，务必立即躲回视线之外。由于摄像机受到远程监控，摧毁它们也会触发警报。不过，你可以为CT-180 多功能发射器使用专门的摄像机干扰弹，使其失效。
note: preserve @ separators; line breaks are escaped as \n

english:
UNITY Memo: Camera disabler@Agent Archer,

I hope this package reaches you safely. I had to send it by rather unconventional means. 

Enclosed you will find a CT-180 Utility Launcher with Camera Disabler ammunition. These devious devices attach to a security camera, capture images from its viewpoint, and project the dummy images into the camera lens. Anyone monitoring the security system will believe he or she is witnessing live footage.

Santa
zh:

希望这个包裹能安全送到你手中。我不得不采用相当不寻常的方式寄送。

包裹内是一具CT-180 多功能发射器，以及摄像机干扰弹。这些巧妙装置会附着在监控摄像机上，捕捉其视角中的画面，再将伪造影像投射到镜头中。任何监控安全系统的人都会以为自己看到的是实时画面。

圣诞老人

english:
Recipe: Herring in a Fur Coat@Mama Pupkin's Recipe for Herring in a Fur Coat:

A herring, 3 boiled potatoes, 1 boiled beetroot, 6 spring onions, 1 jar oil-cured black olives, 2 hard-boiled eggs, sliced.

Scale and dice herring into 1-inch pieces. Peel potatoes and beetroot and dice them into 1/2-inch pieces. Chop spring onions into 1/4-inch pieces. Spread herring pieces on the bottom of the serving bowl, cover with spring onions, then potatoes, then beets. Spread mayonnaise over beets and decorate with olives and slices of egg. Serve chilled.
zh:

鲱鱼1条、煮土豆3个、煮甜菜根1个、青葱6根、油浸黑橄榄1罐、水煮蛋2个并切片。

将鲱鱼去鳞并切成1英寸小块。土豆和甜菜根去皮，切成半英寸小块。青葱切成四分之一英寸小段。将鲱鱼铺在盘底，依次盖上青葱、土豆和甜菜。最后在甜菜上抹蛋黄酱，并用橄榄和鸡蛋片装饰。冷藏后食用。

Sergei Romanov

革命确实近在眼前。我几乎能感到自由的甜美微风拂过皮肤。等待本身就是牢笼，我感到被囚禁、焦躁不安，困在这身可悲的制服以及它所代表的一切之中。

I just saw the weather report. A cold front is moving in from the north. While like both of you I lust for liberation, perhaps we can postpone the revolution until the weather improves. Running naked through the compound in the middle of a blizzard sounds more like insanity than insurgency.

Yuri Prokofiev

english: Letter: Project Eyes Wide Open@Pupkov Laboratory, Petropavlovsk-Kamchatsky\n\nProject Eyes Wide Open Results: The benefits of stimulants are clear. Group A (based in Siberia) was allotted 18 cigarettes and 9 cups of coffee per day. Control Group B (based in Finland) abstained. Over a period of 26 months, Group A was found to sleep 42 percent less on average. While the mortality rate due to on-the-job accidents for Group A was 87 percent higher, we conclude high worker turnover will mitigate decreases in productivity due to aging.
zh: 信件：睁眼计划@普普科夫实验室，堪察加彼得罗巴甫洛夫斯克\n\n“睁眼计划”结果：兴奋剂的益处十分明显。A组（驻西伯利亚）每天配给18支香烟和9杯咖啡；对照B组（驻芬兰）则完全禁用。在26个月内，A组平均睡眠时间减少了42%。尽管A组因工作事故造成的死亡率高出87%，但我们认为较高的员工流动率会减轻老龄化导致的生产效率下降。

Soviet Memo: U.S. Plans@To: General Zhukov
From: Vladimir Kryuchkov

I hope you are sitting down, comrade. Last night I got word from ANATOLI, our man in Palm Beach. He's the farm boy we sent from Kamchatka to infiltrate the highest levels of the Pentagon, which he has done very rapidly considering his poor grasp of the English language. As we feared, the Main Adversary has big plans for Khios. Please see the attached report.
zh:
苏联备忘录：美国计划@收件人：朱可夫将军
发件人：弗拉基米尔·克留奇科夫

同志，希望你现在是坐着的。昨晚我们在棕榈滩的人“阿纳托利”传来消息。他就是那个从堪察加派去渗透五角大楼最高层的农家小子。考虑到他英语很差，进展却异常迅速。正如我们担心的那样，主要敌人正在对希俄斯策划大动作。详见附件报告。
note: preserve @ separators; line breaks are escaped as \n

english:
Soviet Report: Khios 1@U.S. PLANS FOR KHIOS
Part I.

As we all know, the U.S. has been developing a project to covertly launch a nuclear first strike against the Soviet Union by attaching warheads to tiger sharks and sending them up the Dnieper River to Moscow from the Black Sea. They have even created special apparatus for the sharks that let them survive in fresh water. Now ANATOLI reports that this project has been put on hold to prepare for the American invasion of Khios.
zh:
苏联报告：希俄斯1@美国对希俄斯的计划
第1部分

众所周知，美国一直在秘密研发一项计划：把核弹头绑在虎鲨身上，从黑海送入第聂伯河，逆流前往莫斯科，以此对苏联发动核先发打击。他们甚至为鲨鱼研制了能在淡水中生存的特殊装置。如今阿纳托利报告称，为准备美国入侵希俄斯，该计划已被暂时搁置。
note: preserve @ separators; line breaks are escaped as \n

english:
Soviet Report: Khios 2@U.S. PLANS FOR KHIOS
Part II.

The goals of the Main Adversary are clear: conquer Khios militarily, perform highly immoral scientific experiments on the civilian populace, and replace the island's schools and hospitals with fast food restaurants and resort hotels, all in an effort to exploit the precious natural resources of Khios.
zh:
苏联报告：希俄斯2@美国对希俄斯的计划

english: Note: Vending machine@Comrades, do not be fooled by this machine! While filing yesterday, I found evidence of an elaborate conspiracy to trick honest Soviet citizens out of their precious rubles. These vending machines don't actually contain any CCCP Soda. They're just hollow cases with a large tray for collecting coins and a small speaker that plays mechanical noises. Trust no one!\n\nMikhail
zh: 便条：自动售货机@同志们，不要被这台机器骗了！昨天整理文件时，我发现了一场精心策划的阴谋，专门骗取诚实苏联公民珍贵的卢布。这些自动售货机里根本没有任何苏联汽水，只是带有大型投币盘和小扬声器的空壳，扬声器会播放机械运转声。不要相信任何人！\n\n米哈伊尔

english: Report: Puffins@FRATERCULA CIRRHATA\n\nThe tufted puffin gets its name from the conspicuous pale yellow plume that sprouts from behind the bird's eyes. The eyes themselves are an extraordinary yellow color with a bright red ring around the outside. The puffin is a monogamous creature that mates for life. The couple takes turns caring for their one youngster in the rocky den while the other fishes for the whole family all day long.
zh: 报告：角嘴海雀@FRATERCULA CIRRHATA\n\n角嘴海雀因眼后长出的醒目淡黄色羽冠而得名。它们的眼睛本身呈奇特的黄色，外围有一圈鲜红色。海雀实行终身一夫一妻制，夫妻轮流在岩石巢穴中照料唯一的幼鸟，另一只则整天捕鱼养活全家。
note: preserve @ separators; line breaks are escaped as \n

english: Report: Sea Eagle@HALIAECTUS SPELLAGICUS\n\nA Steller sea eagle almost never hunts for his food on his own. The day begins by spying on smaller birds of prey, such as ravens, and following them to a potential meal. From that point, the eagle then proceeds to steal the food. A heated battle can ensue as multiple eagles attempt to steal the same food, and often claws and beaks are used in the attacks.
zh: 报告：虎头海雕@HALIAECTUS SPELLAGICUS\n\n虎头海雕几乎从不亲自捕猎。一天开始时，它会监视乌鸦等较小型猛禽，然后跟随它们找到潜在食物，随后将食物抢走。当多只海雕争夺同一份食物时，可能爆发激烈战斗，爪子和喙常被用来攻击。
note: preserve @ separators; line breaks are escaped as \n

english: Report: Brown Bear@URSUS ARCTOS\n\nThe brown bear is vegetarian for most of the spring, but spends the summer and fall seasons gorging itself on river salmon to prepare itself for the long winter's nap. An adult bear can lose up to 350 pounds per winter, which it must gain back before the next cold season.
zh: 报告：棕熊@URSUS ARCTOS\n\n棕熊在春季大部分时间以植物为食，但夏秋两季会大量吞食河中的鲑鱼，为漫长冬眠做准备。成年棕熊一个冬天最多可减重350磅，必须在下一次寒季到来前补回来。
note: preserve @ separators; line breaks are escaped as \n

english: Report: Fur Seal@CALLORHINUS URSINUS\n\nThe Northern fur seal is a fascinating sea mammal. Rookeries, or flocks, of males arrive first in May and June to establish their territories in areas such as the Pribilof Islands. The males are extremely territorial over their harems and will exert themselves in violent battles and loud echoing personalized calls to claim their property and prove their power.
zh: 报告：北方海狗@CALLORHINUS URSINUS\n\n北方海狗是一种迷人的海洋哺乳动物。每年五六月，雄性会率先抵达普里比洛夫群岛等繁殖地，划定领地。它们对自己的后宫极具占有欲，会通过激烈搏斗和响亮且独特的叫声宣示领地、证明力量。

Soviet Memo: Kamchatka survey@To: General Zhukov's Office
From: Corporal Pupkin

Most revered leader, the people's glorious nature survey of the Kamchatka area is complete. We can now begin the removal of these animals to make way for ten glorious new factories planned for the region, each of which will be manufacturing factory equipment to allow us to build more factories! We expect a tremendous increase in productivity!

Santa

Carbon Copy: Trouble with chicks@Carbon Copy

March 6, 1967

Mr. X,

I am still having trouble scoring with chicks. It makes it very hard to feel like a real super spy when girls don't want to talk to me. In the movies, spies always get lots of women. This situation is affecting my morale. At this rate, I'm not sure I can be ready by June.

Urgently,
Melvin Blitzny
a.k.a. Tom Goodman
zh:
副本：泡妞困难@副本

1967年3月6日

X先生：

我还是泡不到女人。女孩都不愿和我说话，这让我很难觉得自己是真正的超级间谍。电影里的间谍总有一大群女人，这种情况严重打击了我的士气。照这样下去，我不确定六月前能准备好。

十万火急
梅尔文·布利茨尼
又名汤姆·古德曼

Letter: Prissy sap@March 29, 1967

Listen to me, you prissy little sap, I've had about enough of your posturing. Perhaps you don't appreciate the gravity of the situation, so allow me to spell it out in terms your puerile intellect can grasp. You are being watched. Constantly. Should you deviate from the plan I have outlined for you, you will disappear without a trace. I will personally supervise your extermination to ensure that it is as excruciating and protracted as possible.

Smith

信件：娇气蠢货@1967年3月29日

听着，你这个娇气的小蠢货，我受够你装腔作势了。也许你不明白事态有多严重，那我就用你幼稚头脑能够理解的方式说明：你一直受到监视。如果偏离我为你制定的计划，你将无声无息地消失。我会亲自监督你的灭口，确保过程尽可能痛苦而漫长。

史密斯

Letter: Finding the H.A.R.M. password@Agent Archer,

To gain entrance to H.A.R.M.'s India headquarters, you'll need to locate Balaji Malpani, Anoop Banerjee's right hand man. He is responsible for coming up with and distributing the daily passwords. Either eliminate him or use this recording device to eavesdrop when he calls Banerjee this afternoon.

Kamal

巴拉吉在快乐宾客酒店有一间房。把窃听器装在他公寓的电话上，躲到通话结束，然后启动窃听器播放完整录音。

Letter: Kamal's reply@Carbon copy

To: Bruno Lawrie
From: Kamal Khubchandani

Thank you for your generous offer. My motive for assisting you is simple: I am fed up. I do not pretend that I am particularly righteous, but recently my daughter, Laxmi, was born. Seeing her for the first time, I was filled with such overpowering love and peace that I wept. It was very difficult to go back to work and pretend to enjoy the company of these cartoon criminals and their petty schemes. I am sick of villainy.

感谢你的慷慨提议。协助你们的理由很简单：我受够了。我并不假装自己特别正义，但最近女儿拉克希米出生了。第一次看到她时，强烈的爱与平静涌上心头，我忍不住哭了。之后回到工作岗位，假装享受这些漫画式罪犯和他们琐碎阴谋的陪伴，变得非常困难。我厌倦了作恶。

Document: Project Omega@To: Anoop Banerjee
From: Dr. Kussman

Well, my good friend, Project: Omega is proceeding right on schedule. We've had a couple of minor setbacks, but nothing to worry about. The world will never forget 1966, the Year of Omega! We're going to permanently raise the bar in evil Doomsday schemes!

So when are you coming to visit me in Antarctica? I'm starved for intelligent conversation. We're about two hours due south of Russkaya by plane. There isn't much to do, but we have a ping pong table!

好朋友，欧米伽计划正在完全按计划推进。虽然遇到几次小挫折，但无需担心。世界永远不会忘记1966年——欧米伽之年！我们将永久提高邪恶末日计划的标准！

你什么时候来南极看我？我太缺少有水平的谈话了。我们在俄罗斯站正南方约两小时航程处。这里没什么娱乐，不过有一张乒乓球桌！

english:
Note: Rope pulls@Sacre Bleu! My patience wears thin. For the thousandth time, Rope Pulls begin with the RIGHT hand. The next one of you who perpetrates such inexcusable incompetence in my presence shall have his left hand amputated as a permanent reminder of his stupidity.

We practice a sacred Art, mes amis. Honor it and you shall flourish in my grace.

Pierre
zh:
便条：拉绳动作@天哪！我的耐心快耗尽了。第一千次重申，拉绳动作必须从右手开始。下一个敢在我面前犯这种不可原谅错误的人，将被砍掉左手，让他永远记住自己的愚蠢。

朋友们，我们从事的是神圣艺术。尊重它，你们便会在我的恩典中成长。

皮埃尔
